brief: US launched a seventh night of strikes on Iran, escalating Hormuz conflict and driving oil prices higher, while Trump continued to push false election claims and threatened Canada over wildfire smoke. In tech, China's Moonshot AI unveiled a competitive model and a new satellite system for wildfire detection launched. Papers explore writing dynamics, AI's impact on writing, and human-robot interaction.
news_summary: US strikes on Iran continue for seventh night amid Hormuz crisis; Trump escalates election falsehoods and threatens Canada over smoke; Cyclospora linked to Taco Bell lettuce; China's Moonshot AI narrows gap in AI race.
papers_summary: Studies examine biographical factors in L2 writing instruction, children's multimodal writing, and ChatGPT's effects on rhetorical moves in personal statements. Other papers investigate pause analysis, urban driving data, and MLLMs for visualization literacy.

en.brief: US launched a seventh night of strikes on Iran, escalating Hormuz conflict and driving oil prices higher, while Trump continued to push false election claims and threatened Canada over wildfire smoke. In tech, China's Moonshot AI unveiled a competitive model and a new satellite system for wildfire detection launched. Papers explore writing dynamics, AI's impact on writing, and human-robot interaction.
en.news_summary: US strikes on Iran continue for seventh night amid Hormuz crisis; Trump escalates election falsehoods and threatens Canada over smoke; Cyclospora linked to Taco Bell lettuce; China's Moonshot AI narrows gap in AI race.
en.papers_summary: Studies examine biographical factors in L2 writing instruction, children's multimodal writing, and ChatGPT's effects on rhetorical moves in personal statements. Other papers investigate pause analysis, urban driving data, and MLLMs for visualization literacy.

zh.brief: 今日英國新首相貝安德就任，中英關係備受關注；香港禁書清單持續擴大，國安法影響深遠；美國對伊朗連續空襲，油價攀升；中國AI戰略聚焦開源，習近平現身AI大會。
zh.news_summary: 英國工黨黨魁貝安德就任首相，其外交政策尤其是對華關係引發討論；香港國安法下書籍屢遭下架，BBC梳理禁書清單；美國對伊朗發動第七晚空襲，油價升至月內高點；習近平首次出席世界AI大會，強調開源戰略。
zh.papers_summary: 今日無中文論文，但英文論文涉及第二語言寫作、多模態語言模型及AI編碼安全等領域。

todays_image.caption: Both the Palapa satellite medal and the Hormuz strikes highlight disputes over control of vital global passageways—one in orbit, the other at sea.
todays_image.title: Medal, Palapa Satellite, Sally Ride
